samples:
I took a journey through the deep
And I came to this point in my life


From where I am now, there's so much I can do
And yet we all stand upon our own two feet
Now I see and learn that I have been wrong before
As I rise from down on the floor
My heart is full of courage now
To face what comes along
This vision I have for myself: become great


From where I am now, there's so much I can do
And yet we all stand upon our own two feet
Now I see and learn that I have been wrong before
As I rise from down on the floor
My heart is full of courage now
To face what comes along
This vision I have for myself: become great


The only reason why you get hurt is your pride
So don't be afraid and make it grow strong
From where you are now, the path is wide open now
But first you will have to rise up
You are not alone when you come along

In this world we live in
This struggle is so real to us
I’ve lost my way, I don’t know what to do


Don't you see me, running?
So tired of being controlled
My head exploding from all the pain
All these stupid rules


The light at the end is calling for us now
It's blinding our eyes
But no one cares who's falling down
We’re not alone


Running, running
Overwhelming ourselves
Our minds are out of control
Our brains are boiling over now
Falling, falling
No strength left on this planet
And there's a reason why
I have to go away from here


Let it burn in your heart
Get up and start again
Break free from the chains that bind you down
You will find an answer in time
We need to go back and discover what was first
There's nothing else left to do
Run as fast as you can

A deep cry for help
I'm so lonely and I want to die


And I run, no one wants me there
Running so fast, but I get lost in the dark
Don't know how to talk, my mind is blocked out of sight
This pain is unbearable, don't think that I can take it anymore


All alone again, all this time ago
I wish I had never been born at all
I tell myself it's not too late
You cannot see the signs you need to read
Please come back now before I turn to dust
The only way to go from here is up

I feel like dying
But I have a feeling that there must be something else
Out there somewhere
So please come back to me, we've got no choice left


Every step was wrong, try to undo what you did
Now I'm on my knees, crying out loud to god
Can't hold back these tears, my brain is gone, blown away
My heart is broken, my will is shattered

And I just felt so cold
But a ray of light from within me
I'm growing strong, now, in my own skin
And the warmth is around, now I feel
This power running through my veins


The love for myself becomes stronger
The more time goes by, I forget to hate
All those walls have fallen down to the ground
Now I've broken free at last

In this empty room where nothing grows and
Nothing lives, no one else has sense
There's no fear left inside you anymore
It's not important what others say or do
If you don't care then they won't break you down
You can face them all and change your ways
So long as you keep on believing, you will find
What brings happiness to you at last

Open your mind, embrace the silence
And let it live, leave space for life
Don't try too hard, and take your time
Life happens when you give in
Don't be afraid to die before you reach 18
Your innocence gone forever

You're a god to me, but now I see
My pride gone and I fall for you


Come on now, let me hold your hands
In this silence we feel so close
I don't know how long it will last
But I want to try my best not to miss this time of grace


This power is in our hands
And I can feel it all around us


You say: "Follow me!" and I jump from the boat
Dive into space like a bird in flight
The waves below rise up through space
And throw themselves against the sky


Don't be afraid
Let yourself go with it!
Be ready when it comes
You have no reason to doubt it
No words can describe
What you've reached
Open your mind to what's next
Feel this growing pressure
Hold tight on the rope and dive again


Come back down
On solid ground
Please stay grounded
There's nothing else that matters

This vision of a giant is the end
Of a king, he fell from his throne
Reaching your arms out to him
You will see that you have power to change


The great one now stands, reaching for the sky
No need to fight anymore
His face so peaceful and so kind
Now ready to stand tall, free again


Reach up high your hands, reach out your arms
And feel this presence near
This fire in our core makes us alive
We are finally home where we belong
To all those who came before us
All these beings from another place
So true, they were always there
They protected us with love through time


The Great One Now Stands, Reach Up High Your Hands
And Feel This Presence Near

Come back on top of my head
But never let me go away
I'm just too tired, I won't complain
That you left me down on the ground
One day I will die but until then
Remain faithful and true

In the forest, I am watching how it grows
My feelings are growing while I watch
And I see its structure change in time
And my emotions come to light


On the way to the center of this great sphere
I'm going so high as human being can go
By rising above what is below me and beyond
It all comes together in a ball of light, then...


A powerful force that is everywhere present
For we all belong to each other, for evermore


There is a world out there waiting for you
You have to find your place on this big stage
The power of nature will teach us everything
No one else can help us now but ourselves


We enter a door that has been opened wide
Now let yourself feel it expand within
This energy runs through every atom inside
And we know our lives were born from dust


A powerful force that is everywhere present
For we all belong to each other, for ever more

From birth until death

I've seen you all around me
You crawl inside my mind
It seems to be so true
That I belong to you


Don't try to tell the truth
Just say the words that come
From deep inside of you
And don't you ever fight


Your eyes are closed, but you can see
The reason for your pain is coming to life now
Your thoughts are so blurred
Inside you feel like dying
But from your heart and soul comes out this cry

Open your eyes now
See the world awake
Now go and change it
Take control over your life


This fire is burning in the dark
Wake up and strike now
Bring down your fist on them who treat you wrong
They will never learn to heal themselves
Unless they face their fear

On top of this great mountain
You're getting too high
So close to the sky
Is there no end? You have to learn how to fly
For a moment take off
In silence you'll find your way
And come back soon
To earth again

I'm on my own
And I'll fight to survive
In this cage of steel


My mind is clear now
These walls are collapsing
I find myself standing strong


Don't get so lost in the game
You will be disappointed
The laws that you live by
They're not what they seem


Hold tight and brace yourself
Don't bow down, don't surrender
Hold tight and brace yourself
On your feet, do it again


Fight to survive
Don't let them break us down


The law of pain becomes a gift
No matter how hard things may hit you
Your body was built for survival
Now all these tests are over with


Life comes down to choices made
There is no way out but forward
You can only change tomorrow
By being different today
The Law of Pain becomes a gift
When you learn from the past and move on


The law of pain becomes a gift
When you learn from the past and move on

Out of nowhere, I see them
They are there to end my life
They want me dead now
My blood is boiling inside


I don't know who they think I am
But it feels like being pushed down
No matter what I try
To do the best for myself
No matter how hard I try
I will never belong there
No matter where I go
The laws I follow feel too cruel for me


In a cage out in the open
I have no place to hide
A prison cell in the street
Is all that I can find



This vision makes me cry
You think you own my soul
And tell me what to do and say?
You must be insane

Just free me from this pain
You cannot even touch me when I lay here
You could not control me yet I gave you power over me
Before I chose to fight back


Every time I die I become reborn
Now I choose to live on for ever
Bending forward just so long
